programs.title: Dating Death
programs.desc: Rodney Alcala flees Los Angeles in 1968 after the rape and attempted murder of an 8-year-old girl, but after moving to New York under an assumed name, he begins working at a New Hampshire arts camp for children.

programs.title: Dating Death
programs.desc: After his early release in 1974 from prison, Rodney Alcala's victim count continues to rise as he uses his photography skills to prey on both young women and children.

programs.title: Dating Death
programs.desc: In 1979 on Huntington Beach, Calif., a girl goes missing and is later found dead in a wooded area; the only lead is a sketch composite that resembles Alcala.
